description: A demo fractional real-estate asset referencing office-unit rental cash flows in a marina business district. Disclosures focus on occupancy, lease stability, and issuance-price market value displayed from Arc contract data.

docs.label: Offering memorandum
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Summarizes rental income, share structure, and fee assumptions.

docs.label: Valuation memo
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Presents illustrative property valuation and lease assumptions.

docs.label: Custody statement
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Describes the asset-interest custody narrative for demo purposes.
